title: KAIMyEntity-C
body:
This is fork of [asuka-mio’s version](https://github.com/asuka-mio/KAIMyEntity).  
Original mod is made by [kjkjkAIStudio](https://github.com/kjkjkAIStudio/KAIMyEntity).

KAIMyEntity allows you to render 3D models of MikuMikuDance instead of default entities.    
  
---
